textByHash.1a689ecc243d37f6235bf9c2818347dfddf7d59d: So please do not disturb us further.
textByHash.41925442d4f9c4fd73a4ede56d0d2478b48046ac: Please do not disturb our deliberations.
textByHash.9de86be0a426b82f0d69ba27a864fd445c056ac3: Lord Shayzien wishes us to draw up contingency plans for various scenarios in the ongoing war against the lizardmen.
textByHash.aab2a6c1b1ec9cdcef941010931c28e7613de039: If they ever succeed in cutting us off from Lovakengj, our supply lines will be severely constrained, and I must work on alternative plans.
